zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Gernon於1308年出生在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 利斯時，他的父親Roger Gernon I109歲，母親Mrs R Gernon107歲。他於從1341年到1374年與Alice結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1384年1月7日在英國越可爾多卡斯特享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Gernon于1308年出生在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 利斯时，他的父亲Roger Gernon I109岁，母亲Mrs R Gernon107岁。他于从1341年到1374年与Alice结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1384年1月7日在英国越可爾多卡斯特享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Grennan   1.

variants.name: Grennan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Kieran.
English (Lancashire, of Norman origin): nickname for a man with a moustache, from Old French gernon, grenon ‘moustache’.
Irish (Offaly, Westmeath and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Grianáin (see Greenan ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Gernon was born in 1308, in Little Leighs, Essex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger Gernon I, was 109 and his mother, Mrs R Gernon, was 107. He married Alice from 1341 to 1374. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 7 January 1384, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 76.

Il a épousé Alice du 1341 au 1374. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1384, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Gernonが1308年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル レイグhスで生まれた時，父Roger Gernon Iは109歳，母Mrs R Gernonは107歳であった。から1341年まで1374年にAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1384年1月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Gernon(이)가 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Gernon I(은)는 109세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs R Gernon(은)는 107세였다. 그는 1341년 부터 1374년 까지 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1384년 1월 7일 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Gernon родился в 1308 г. в местности литл лигс, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger Gernon I было 109 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs R Gernon, 107. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice с 1341 по 1374. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 7 января 1384 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Gernon nació en 1308, en Little Leighs, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger Gernon I, tenía 109 años y su mamá, Mrs R Gernon, tenía 107 años. Se casó con Alice desde 1341 hasta 1374. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 7 de enero de 1384, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
